scope: Codex local repository structure, formats, and reference workflow

docs.title: Agent Config Format
docs.summary: Documents the Codex agent role structure used from .codex/config.toml and per-role TOML files.

docs.title: Skill Package Format
docs.summary: Documents SKILL.md frontmatter, optional scripts and references, and agents/openai.yaml usage.

docs.title: Repository Codex Layout
docs.summary: Explains how this repository maps agents, skills, and reference material under .codex and reference/codex.
use_when: understanding why skills are explicitly registered

docs.title: Reference Workflow
docs.summary: Defines how agents should read, use, and maintain reference/codex documents during Codex meta work.
use_when: deciding which reference document to read
updating reference docs after a change

docs.title: PR Ready Automation Policy
docs.summary: Records the repository's working policy for automatic draft-to-ready PR promotion, including minimum CI candidates, current tooling constraints, recommended implementation order, and the local Codex assets used to implement the gate.
use_when: choosing required CI checks for review readiness
debugging why a PR did not auto-promote
deciding whether automation should live in GitHub Actions or local tooling
using the local github-automation-agent or pr-ready-automation skill
